title: TerrainSpec
description: PW-WSF-300 Terrain Standard. Defines every static physical feature of the world surface and subsurface. Terrain represents permanent geometry and composition. Does not own atmosphere, weather, lighting, time, planetary physics, or entities.

TerrainUUID.description: Universally unique identifier for a terrain object.

ScalarWithUnit.description: A scalar value with its SI unit and measurement uncertainty.

unit.description: SI unit symbol, e.g. m, kg/m³, Pa.

altitude_m.description: Height above reference ellipsoid (WGS84 default), meters.

CoordinateReference.description: Multi-CRS coordinate supporting WGS84, ECEF, UTM, MGRS, EPSG, local, and planetocentric frames.

local_enu.description: East-North-Up local coordinate, meters from local origin.

local_ned.description: North-East-Down local coordinate, meters from local origin.

epsg_code.description: EPSG CRS code, e.g. 4326 for WGS84.

epsg_coords.description: Coordinate values in EPSG CRS order.

planetocentric.description: Planetocentric Cartesian, meters, for non-Earth bodies.

min_altitude_m.description: Minimum altitude in bounding volume, meters.

max_altitude_m.description: Maximum altitude in bounding volume, meters.

TerrainIdentity.description: Identity and provenance of a terrain object.

ontology_uri.description: Ontology class URI for this terrain object.

dataset_name.description: Source dataset name, e.g. 'Copernicus DEM GLO-30'.

source_crs.description: Source coordinate reference system, e.g. EPSG:4326.

custom_properties.description: Extension point for domain-specific identity metadata.

TerrainClassification.description: Multi-faceted terrain classification covering scientific, military, civilian, and planetary categories.

habitat_classification.description: EUNIS, IUCN or custom habitat code.

corine_land_cover_code.description: CORINE Land Cover nomenclature code, e.g. 111 = continuous urban fabric.

nlcd_code.description: USGS National Land Cover Database code.

SpatialExtent.description: Spatial coverage, resolution, and streaming configuration of the terrain dataset.

angular_arcsec.description: Angular resolution in arc-seconds for geographic grids.

range_m.description: Camera distance threshold for this LOD.

overlap_m.description: Chunk overlap to prevent seam artifacts.

ElevationModel.description: Digital elevation, surface, and terrain models plus derived products.

dem_ref.description: Reference to a Digital Elevation Model file, URI, or asset registry ID.

dsm_ref.description: Digital Surface Model reference (includes vegetation and built structures).

height_map_ref.description: Reference to a 16- or 32-bit grayscale heightmap texture.

flow_direction.description: D8 or D-infinity flow direction raster reference.

BathymetryModel.description: Underwater terrain — seafloor, lake bottom, and river bottom.

depth_grid_ref.description: Reference to a depth raster or GeoTIFF.

SurfaceMaterialRef.description: Reference to one or more material.schema.json materials for a terrain surface zone.

material_map_ref.description: Reference to a material classification raster (e.g. land cover geotiff).

usda_taxonomy.description: USDA Soil Taxonomy order, e.g. Entisol.

fao_wrb.description: FAO/WRB Reference Soil Group, e.g. Cambisol.

horizons.description: Soil horizon layers from surface downward.

horizon_id.description: Munsell or FAO horizon symbol, e.g. Ah, Bw.

GeologicalFeatures.description: Geological and geotechnical features of terrain.

rock_strength.description: Uniaxial compressive strength class per ISRM.

vs30_m_s.description: Average shear wave velocity to 30m depth, m/s.

network_ref.description: NHD / HydroSHEDS / custom hydrological network reference.

InfrastructureRef.description: Reference-only record of static infrastructure features. Entity definitions live in entity.schema.json.

ObstacleFeature.description: Natural or artificial obstacle affecting mobility.

is_minefield_ref.description: If true, entity_ref points to a minefield entity definition.

NavigationSurface.description: Traversability and navigation analysis for robots, vehicles, and pedestrians.

mobility_cost_map_ref.description: Reference to a NATO mobility cost raster.

MilitaryTerrainAnalysis.description: OCOKA terrain analysis: Observation and Fields of Fire, Cover and Concealment, Obstacles, Key Terrain, Avenues of Approach.

key_terrain.description: Features that, if controlled, afford marked advantage.

SensorTerrainEffects.description: Terrain effects on electromagnetic, acoustic, and other sensor modalities.

restitution_coefficient.description: Coefficient of restitution for impacts. Dimensionless.

GISIntegration.description: GIS data source and format integration metadata.

TerrainAIMetadata.description: AI and knowledge graph metadata for terrain semantic reasoning.

embedding_vector.description: Semantic embedding vector for nearest-neighbor retrieval.

PlanetaryExtension.description: Extension for non-Earth terrain (Moon, Mars, asteroids, space stations).

Terrain.title: Terrain
Terrain.description: Complete terrain specification for a PhysWorldLM WorldSpec. Defines all static physical features of the world surface and subsurface.

sub_terrains.description: Hierarchical nested terrain regions (e.g., city districts within a region).

extensions.description: Domain-specific extension fields. Use reverse-DNS namespace keys.

identity.name: helmand_river_valley_v1
identity.description: Southern Afghanistan alluvial plain and surrounding desert terrain.
